sample_reviews.author: James Holroyd
sample_reviews.text: Always well-stocked and the staff really know their stuff. As a plumber, this is my go-to trade counter in Manchester. Competitive prices and fast service.

sample_reviews.author: Steve Moran
sample_reviews.text: Reliable merchant with a good range of products. The team are helpful and can usually source parts quickly if they don't have them in stock.

sample_reviews.author: David Cartwright
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant trade counter — staff know exactly what you need and get you sorted quickly. Far better than the big national chains for specialist plumbing parts.

brand.usp: Manchester's trusted trade plumbing merchant, supplying professional plumbers and heating engineers with a comprehensive range of quality products at competitive trade prices from our well-stocked Moston depot.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trade Plumbing Supplies Done Right
brand.about_paragraph: We're Manchester Plumbing Supplies Ltd, a dedicated trade counter serving plumbers, heating engineers, and building professionals across Greater Manchester from our Thorp Road depot in M40. We stock a wide range of plumbing and heating products — from pipes and fittings to boiler components and sanitaryware — so you can get what you need and get on with the job. Our knowledgeable team is here to help you find the right parts at the right price, every time.
